name: libsafe-isa-perl
title: libsafe-isa-perl
summary: module for safely calling isa and friends on things that may not be objects
description:
module for safely calling isa and friends on things that may not be objects
Since Perl allows providing a subroutine reference, or a method name, to
the -> operator (when used as a method call) and a subroutine doesn't require
the invocant to actually be an object, Safe::Isa can be used to create safe
versions of isa, can, does and DOES by using a subroutine reference that
only tries to call the method if it's actually used on an object.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsafe-isa-perl because module for safely calling isa and friends on things that may not be objects.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsafe-isa-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsafe-isa-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsafe-isa-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
